home.title: CareerMatch AI
home.tagline: Your intelligent job search partner for the New Zealand market

resumeBuilder.title: Smart Resume Builder
resumeBuilder.description: Create and optimize your resume with AI-powered suggestions tailored to each job.

jobMatching.title: AI Job Matching
jobMatching.description: Get intelligent 8-dimension analysis to find your perfect job match.

applicationTracking.title: Application Tracking
applicationTracking.description: Track your applications, interviews, and progress in one organized dashboard.

extension.title: Get AI Career Assistant Support Anywhere
extension.description: Install the CareerMatch AI browser extension to get job analysis and resume suggestions directly on Seek, LinkedIn and other job sites. One-click import jobs and seamlessly integrate with your job search workflow.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Start managing your resumes and job applications
dashboard.resumeManagementDesc: Create, edit and manage your resumes
dashboard.jobManagementDesc: Browse and save jobs you're interested in
dashboard.applicationTrackingDesc: Track your application progress and interview schedules
dashboard.completedFeaturesDesc: Resume Management + Job Management + AI Matching + Application Tracking
dashboard.newFeaturesDesc: Application list, details, timeline visualization, status management

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Please login to your account
auth.welcomeRegister: Create your account and start your smart job search
auth.loginDesc: Use your email and password to login
auth.registerDesc: Fill in the information below to create your account
auth.agreeToTerms: I have read and agree to the
auth.loginFooter: By logging in, you agree to our
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password, please try again
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please verify your email address first
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.mustAgreeTerms: Please agree to the terms of service and privacy policy
auth.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please login or use a different email
auth.passwordNotSecure: Password does not meet security requirements, please try again
auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email and click the verification link to complete registration.

auth.registerError: An error occurred during registration, please try again later
auth.passwordHint: Tip: At least 8 characters, including uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers and special characters

jobs.title: Job Management
jobs.subtitle: Save and track jobs you're interested in
jobs.noJobs: You haven't added any jobs yet
jobs.noJobsDesc: Add jobs you're interested in to start smart matching
jobs.addJobDesc: Save jobs you're interested in to start smart matching analysis
jobs.aiMatchAnalysisDesc: Analyze resume-job match and get optimization suggestions
jobs.aiCoverLetterDesc: Generate personalized cover letter based on job requirements
jobs.smartImportDesc: Paste job link or content, AI automatically extracts job information
jobs.workspaceDescription: Keep the queue focused on high-value decisions: capture the role, let background analysis run, then review only the jobs worth moving forward.

sectionDescriptions.saved: Newly captured roles waiting for a decision. Background analysis status stays visible here so you can avoid opening every job.
sectionDescriptions.applied: Roles already in motion. Keep this section compact and outcome-focused.
sectionDescriptions.interview: Active opportunities that justify deeper preparation and document work.
sectionDescriptions.archived: Lower-value historical items stay available, but no longer compete with active decision work.

detail.analysisQueuedDesc: The job is saved and waiting for the background task to run.
detail.analysisRunningDesc: The background task is analyzing fit. You can leave this page and come back later.
detail.analysisCompletedDesc: The latest match analysis is ready.
detail.analysisFailedDesc: The background analysis did not complete.
detail.decisionTitle: Decide whether this role deserves more time
detail.decisionDesc: Review automatic matching and the job critique before moving into applications, materials, and follow-up work.
detail.matchAnalysisDesc: Once background analysis finishes, this becomes the main entry point for the full report.
detail.analysisGenerating: Background analysis is running. You can leave this page and return later.
detail.analysisEmpty: No match analysis is available yet. Start analysis when you are ready.
detail.nextActionsDesc: Keep only the actions that affect progress: materials and application tracking should not compete with the decision step.
detail.generatedMaterialsDesc: Shown only when output exists, so empty panels do not distract from the decision.
detail.selectResumeFirst: Select or create a resume first
detail.processFailed: Failed to start processing. Please try again.
detail.summaryDescription: Generate a concise critique covering role highlights, risks, and decision points before spending more time.

import.title: Import jobs
import.description: Capture the original posting first, then decide whether to save it. Keep URL and text import in one place to avoid repeated work.
import.urlLabel: Job page URLs, one per line
import.urlPlaceholder:
Paste text that includes links, for example:
https://seek.co.nz/job/123, https://linkedin.com/jobs/...
import.urlHelp: We can extract multiple links from pasted text, line breaks, or comma-separated lists.
import.contentHelp: Copy the full job description from the hiring page.
import.resultsDescription: Review quality before saving. Duplicates or low-quality results can be left out here.

form.submitFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.jobTitlePlaceholder: For example: Senior Full Stack Developer
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter the main responsibilities and day-to-day work...
form.requirementsPlaceholder: Enter skills, experience, education, and other requirements...
form.benefitsPlaceholder: Enter benefits offered by the company...

coverLetter.title: AI Cover Letter Generator
coverLetter.subtitle: Generate personalized cover letter based on your profile and job requirements
coverLetter.ensureProfile: Please ensure your profile is complete for best results
coverLetter.regenerateHint: Use Regenerate to create a new version.

resumes.subtitle: Manage all your resume versions, customize for different positions

resumes.noResumes: You haven't created any resumes yet

form.objectivePlaceholder: Briefly describe your career goals and target roles...
form.emptySkills: No skills yet. Use the button above to add one.

form.emptyEducation: No education yet. Use the button above to add one.

profile.title: Profile
profile.completeHintLow: Complete your profile for better job matching
profile.completeHintMedium: Profile is mostly complete, keep improving for better results
profile.completeHintHigh: Profile is nearly complete, add a few more details

placeholders.professionalSummary: Briefly describe your professional background, core skills, and career goals...
placeholders.targetRoles: Comma separated, e.g.: Frontend Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Tech Lead

work.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this work experience?

education.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this education record?

developingFeatures.addWork: Add work experience feature is under development...

upload.importDescription: Upload your resume file and AI will automatically extract information to fill your profile. You can preview and modify the extracted content before importing.
upload.dragDropOr: or drag and drop file here
upload.fileTypeHint: Support PDF, Word, TXT format, max 10MB
upload.fileTypeError: Please upload PDF, Word or TXT format file
upload.aiExtractionHint: AI will extract the following information:

extractionItems.basicInfo: Basic information (name, contact, social links, etc.)
extractionItems.workExperience: Work experience (company, position, time, achievements, tech stack)
extractionItems.other: Other valuable information (volunteer work, publications, etc.)

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Smart Career Advisor
assistant.greetingDesc: I can help you analyze jobs, optimize resumes, generate cover letters, or answer any career-related questions.

suggestions.optimizeResume: How can I improve my resume?

upload.orDragFile: Or drag and drop resume file
upload.analyzeSuccess:
Resume "{fileName}" parsed successfully!

Your profile and skills have been updated. You can ask me: "What jobs suit me?" or "Help me write a cover letter".
upload.analyzeFailed: Resume "{fileName}" parsing failed. Please ensure the file format is correct and not corrupted.
upload.fileTypeError: Unsupported file type. Please upload PDF, Word or TXT file.
upload.sessionCreateFailed: Failed to create session, please refresh the page

input.placeholder: Type a message, or drag resume...
input.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line

analysisCard.loadingHint: Click to view real-time analysis progress

quickActions.generateCoverLetterDesc: AI writes personalized cover letter for this job
quickActions.aiOptimizeResumeDesc: Create a targeted resume for this job
quickActions.importJobDesc: Smart import job from URL or text
quickActions.applyNowDesc: Create an application and start tracking
quickActions.optimizeResumeMessage: Resume optimization feature is under development. You can check the suggestions in the analysis results to manually optimize your resume.

analysis.title: AI Analysis
analysis.selectMethodDesc: You can analyze using an existing resume, or get resume suggestions based on your profile
analysis.resumeMatchingDesc: Select a resume to analyze its match with the job
analysis.profileAnalysisDesc: Get targeted resume suggestions based on your profile
analysis.noResumeHint: You haven't created a resume yet. After analysis, you can create a targeted resume based on suggestions

features.matchEvaluationDesc: Analyze how well your background matches the job
features.strengthsWeaknessesDesc: Identify competitive advantages and areas to improve

analysis.readyToAnalyzeDesc: Click the button below, AI will deeply analyze the match between your resume and this job
analysis.streamingAnalysisDesc: View AI-generated analysis in real-time as it's being created
analysis.batchAnalysisDesc: Wait for AI to complete the full analysis and display results at once
analysis.profileBasedDesc: AI will analyze your profile's match with this job and provide targeted resume writing suggestions

optimize.title: AI Resume Optimization
optimize.subtitle: Preview AI-optimized resume and apply changes
optimize.optimizingDesc: Analyzing job requirements and optimizing resume content, please wait...

v2.title: 8-Dimension Intelligent Analysis
v2.description: AI-powered deep 8-dimension analysis providing detailed CV strategy, interview preparation tips, and match assessment
v2.pageHeaderNote: Use this page for the full decision trail. The job detail page stays focused on quick scanning.
v2.workspaceTitle: Decide whether this role deserves more time
v2.workspaceDescription: The full analysis explains the score, requirements, risks, resume strategy, and interview preparation in one place.
v2.resultDescription: Start with the score, then review the evidence behind it before generating application materials.
v2.nextActionsDescription: Regenerate the analysis if the job or profile changed. Generate a resume only after the role still looks worth pursuing.
v2.outputLanguageNote: AI analysis is written in English by default so downstream resumes and cover letters stay consistent.
v2.templateRecommendationReason: Recommended from the CV strategy: {tone} tone fits this role.

scope.decisionDesc: See the score and recommendation before spending time on materials.
scope.evidenceDesc: Break down requirements, keywords, gaps, and risk instead of relying on a single summary.
scope.resumeDesc: Identify which skills, projects, and experience should move forward in the CV.
scope.interviewDesc: Keep likely questions and preparation notes attached to the same role.

templateSelector.title: Select Resume Template
templateSelector.subtitle: Choose a template style that fits the target position

modernBlue.description: Modern minimalist style, suitable for most positions

classicSerif.description: Traditional formal style, suitable for formal industries

creativeGradient.description: Creative gradient style, suitable for creative positions

executiveMinimal.description: Minimalist executive style with ample whitespace

technicalDark.description: Dark technical style with code font

aiProvider.title: Select AI Model
aiProvider.autoSelectDesc: System auto-selects the best available AI model (Priority: Claude > OpenAI > Codex > Gemini)
aiProvider.tip: Different AI models may produce different analysis results. Recommend using "Auto Select" mode for first time.
aiProvider.configureHint: Please configure at least one AI provider API key in .env.local file
